audit_items.proof_trace: Config loader accepts fork epochs from YAML without validating strict ordering (Genesis < Altair < ... < Fulu). The merge() function silently sorts entries by epoch, allowing semantically invalid configs where fork version enums become decoupled from their intended epochs, potentially causing consensus failures in testnets/devnets.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Misconfigured testnet YAML defines BELLATRIX_FORK_EPOCH < ALTAIR_FORK_EPOCH. Config loads successfully, schedule is epoch-sorted, but version-to-epoch mappings become incorrect, causing nodes to apply wrong fork rules at specific epochs and diverge from correctly-configured peers.
